title: Bandishala
overview: Madhavi Sawant is a resilient police officer who tries to root out the corrupt administration in the prisons. However, she makes powerful enemies who plot a gang rape against her. The harrowing incident leaves a strong Madhavi, broken. The film attempts to bring out the discrimination and crimes against women to the forefront through Madhavi's story.
